name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Spooler Service Binary Load
notes:
This Building Block detect DLL Load from Spooler Service backup folder.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: FPT.EagleEye, Thomas Patzke (improvements)
SIGMA Title: Windows Spooler Service Suspicious Binary Load
SIGMA Description: Detect DLL Load from Spooler Service backup folder


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Spooler Service Binary Load on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Object Load Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of spoolsv.exe
when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of dll
when the event matches (LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\windows\system32\spool\drivers\x64\3\%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\windows\system32\spool\drivers\x64\4\%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Spooler Service Binary Load on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Object Load Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of spoolsv.exe
AND when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of dll
AND when the event matches (LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\windows\system32\spool\drivers\x64\3\%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\windows\system32\spool\drivers\x64\4\%') AQL filter query
